title: Turkish meals
description: Adds kebab, yoghurt, pasty, lahmacun and ayran to the game
body:
# ![Turkish Meals Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/58QLAd2s/images/6655ca552eed5fa43cbe0c4ae6ab9545097ae6e0.png)
Adds kebab, yoghurt, Pasty, Lahmacun and ayran to the game (Yoghurt is normally made differently but I simplified it in Minecraft)
